rows.can_claim: A narrow post-2022Q3 financing-estimates pilot with 14 reviewed current-sample financing components, 6 benchmark-ready rows, and 5 Tier A components.
rows.cannot_claim: A settled or full-sample causal estimate of Treasury issuance effects on long rates; 8 financing rows remain post-release-invalid and the long-rate translation layer is still supporting/provisional.
rows.boundary_reason: 14 current-sample financing rows; 6 benchmark-ready; 5 Tier A; 1 context-only; 8 post-release-invalid.
